decisions.title: Scope of Audit
decisions.context: Existing tests are unit-level only. No integration tests. Options range from vuln-only to full audit.
options: C: Vulnerabilities + license compliance + version staleness

decisions.title: Transitive Dependency Depth
decisions.context: 340 transitive dependencies in the tree. Direct-only covers 20 packages.

decisions.title: Output Verbosity
decisions.context: npm audit output is verbose and hard to read. Need to balance detail with readability.

decisions.title: Remediation Suggestions
decisions.context: Users need actionable output. Fix commands risk suggesting breaking changes.
